name: Joel Kim Booster
bio: Joel Kim Booster is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer known for candid, self-aware material about identity, sexuality, and being a Korean American adoptee. He broke through in the 2010s on the alternative comedy circuit before writing and starring in the 2022 film Fire Island and releasing his debut Netflix special. He has also appeared in the series Loot and Sunnyside.

timeline.ev: Releases debut comedy album, Model Minority
Performs on Conan and The Late Late Show
Writes and stars in the film Fire Island
Joins the cast of Apple TV+ comedy Loot

accolades: Critics Choice Award nomination for Psychosexual (2022)
Named one of the best comedy specials of 2022 by Variety
WGA Award nomination for writing Fire Island
